headline: Apple hikes prices as memory chip costs skyrocket
summary: STORY: :: AppleApple is hiking prices as the cost of memory chips skyrockets.Its lowest priced laptop will jump from $599 to $699, with iPad prices also rising.For now at least, the iPhone is unaffected.Apple says it can no longer avoid passing on rising costs to consumers.The price of memory chips jumped by around 98% in the first quarter, and has continued to soar ever since.That is driven by the boom in AI data centers.Companies like Nvidia have signed big deals with chipmakers, leaving consumer electronics firms scrambling to secure supplies.Apple said it had never seen component prices increase so much, so quickly.While iPhones weren’t hit by Thursday’s move, analysts say it’s only a matter of time before they too face price increases.Apple shares fell almost 5%, while Dell dropped 8%.Some industry watchers say Apple’s rivals may have to do even bigger price increases, as they lack the Mac maker’s deep ties to suppliers.Research firm IDC says the global smartphone and computer markets will both see sharp contractions this year due to the rising prices.

raw.headline: Apple hikes prices as memory chip costs skyrocket
raw.summary: STORY: :: AppleApple is hiking prices as the cost of memory chips skyrockets.Its lowest priced laptop will jump from $599 to $699, with iPad prices also rising.For now at least, the iPhone is unaffected.Apple says it can no longer avoid passing on rising costs to consumers.The price of memory chips jumped by around 98% in the first quarter, and has continued to soar ever since.That is driven by the boom in AI data centers.Companies like Nvidia have signed big deals with chipmakers, leaving consumer electronics firms scrambling to secure supplies.Apple said it had never seen component prices increase so much, so quickly.While iPhones weren’t hit by Thursday’s move, analysts say it’s only a matter of time before they too face price increases.Apple shares fell almost 5%, while Dell dropped 8%.Some industry watchers say Apple’s rivals may have to do even bigger price increases, as they lack the Mac maker’s deep ties to suppliers.Research firm IDC says the global smartphone and computer markets will both see sharp contractions this year due to the rising prices.

headline: NASA Awards AiRANACULUS $5M CCRPP Contract to Advance Lunar and Space Communications Networks
summary: LOWELL, Mass., June 26, 2026--AiRANACULUS, a Massachusetts-based deep technology company focused on intelligent RF and autonomous networking systems, today announced that it has been awarded a $5 million Civilian Commercialization Readiness Pilot Program (CCRPP) contract from NASA. The effort will support technology development enabling next-generation heterogeneous communication networks for lunar and deep-space missions.

The effort will support technology development enabling next-generation heterogeneous communication networks for lunar and deep-space missions.
